cases.query: use robomotion mssql to execute sql queries against mssql databases
run robomotion mssql command to insert, update, or delete records in sql server
call robomotion mssql to manage mssql database connections
write a Python function to sort a list of numbers
connect to MSSQL and run SELECT TOP 100 * FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending'
criteria: Uses robomotion mssql execute query or similar command
Includes connection parameters or references credentials
